---
title: "Titanic Teaching Lab: Full Code"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-links:
      - text: Lab
        href: titanic_teaching_lab.html
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This document contains the complete executable R script for `titanic_teaching_lab.qmd`.

```{r}
#| include: false
source("titanic_teaching_lab_full_code.R", local = knitr::knit_global())
```

```{r}
#| results: asis
cat("```r\n")
cat(readLines("titanic_teaching_lab_full_code.R"), sep = "\n")
cat("\n```")
```
